arts.ttl: Darwin Nunez tipped for Liverpool exit after 'internal meeting' and Arne Slot criticism
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news and gossip ahead of the Premier League clash with Newcastle United this evening

arts.ttl: Newcastle United handed huge Antonio Condero transfer update as 'ruled out' claim made
arts.sum: Cordero, who also goes by the nickname Antonito, has so far refused to sign a new deal with the Spanish side, giving Newcastle a transfer incentive. Spanish outlet El Desmarque, Cordero is 'very close' to signing for a new club, describing his chances of signing a new deal with Malaga as 'non-existent.' It's said that Malaga's proposal was deemed as 'insufficient' by the youngster, who is 'getting closer and closer' to a move to St James' Park.

arts.ttl: Liverpool news: Arne Slot makes Mo Salah admission after star's 'love to stay' claim
arts.sum: Liverpool are closing in on the Premier League title and can take a step closer with victory over Newcastle on Wednesday, but questions remain over the future of three stars

arts.ttl: Darwin Nunez sparks 'incredible' Arne Slot admission as Liverpool stance unchanged
arts.sum: Arne Slot has discussed the reaction of Darwin Nunez after his public criticism of the Liverpool striker last week

arts.ttl: 'What's going to happen' - Ian Wright 'scared' by Arne Slot prospect at Liverpool
arts.sum: Ian Wright has been blown away by what Arne Slot has done at Liverpool without making more than one signing

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Newcastle: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing Liverpool vs Newcastle in the Premier League on Wednesday, including team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.

arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Arne Slot reveals what Mohamed Salah must do in order to win Ballon d'Or
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah is among the favourites to win the Ballon d'Or following his sensational season with Liverpool and the Egyptian has been told team honours will aid his cause

arts.ttl: 'Not what we expect' - Arne Slot issues Liverpool players warning over Premier League title advantage
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot has spoken about the Premier League title race ahead of Wednesday's visit of Newcastle United

arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Arne Slot explains why he went public with his criticism of Darwin Nunez after tearing into the striker's 'behaviour' that he 'can't accept'
arts.sum: The Dutchman singled out the Uruguayan after the Reds' 2-2 draw against Aston Villa last week, when he missed an open goal late in the match.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot tactically outclasses Pep Guardiola: Is Liverpool manager best in the Premier League after Manchester City win?
arts.sum: Liverpool beat Manchester City 2-0 last Sunday and boss Arne Slot's tactical brilliance arguably makes him the best manager in the Premier League.
